title: How to proceed with MICU self-assessment

blocks.text: How to proceed with MICU self-assessment
The self-diagnostic function of the MICU can be performed by checking DTC (using HDS) or DTC (not using HDS).
Self-diagnosis mode 1
Performs self-diagnosis of MICU communication errors and indicates failure codes by the number of times the interior light blinks.
Self-diagnosis mode 2
By operating the input lines (switches, sensors, etc.) to each unit, the interior lights indicate whether the lines are normal or not.
Example: The

rows: *: For vehicles equipped with the SRS unit manufactured by TRW, the same circuit is used, so it is linked to a single switch operation.

blocks.text: Cancellation of self-diagnostic mode
To cancel the self-diagnostic mode, set the ignition to the ignition OFF (LOCK) mode.
1. Connect HDS to the data link coupler (16P) (A).
Refer to the instruction manual for the use of HDS.

items.text: If a DTC is displayed in the combination meter, confirm the failure diagnosis of the displayed DTC.
Each time the Select/Reset knob is pressed, the next DTC is displayed.
